creator: russo@bogodyn.org
text:
qt4-dbus build gets the following error during build, which prevents a full upgrade of qt4 from version 4.4.3:

g++ -Wl,-O1 -pthread -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib/qt4 -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib/qt4 -o ../../../bin/qdbus .obj/release-shared/qdbus.o    -L/usr/local/lib/qt4 -L/usr/ports/devel/dbus-qt4/work/qt-x11-opensource-src-4.5.2/lib -L/usr/local/lib -lQtDBus -L/usr/local/lib/qt4 -L/usr/local/lib -pthread -pthread -pthread -pthread -pthread -pthread -lQtXml -pthread -pthread -lQtCore -lz -lm -pthread -lgthread-2.0 -lglib-2.0 -liconv
.obj/release-shared/qdbus.o(.text+0x2da0): In function `printArg(QVariant const&)':
: undefined reference to `QDBusUtil::argumentToString(QVariant const&)'
*** Error code 1
Stop in /usr/ports/devel/dbus-qt4/work/qt-x11-opensource-src-4.5.2/tools/qdbus/qdbus.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/devel/dbus-qt4/work/qt-x11-opensource-src-4.5.2/tools/qdbus/qdbus.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/devel/dbus-qt4/work/qt-x11-opensource-src-4.5.2/tools/qdbus.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/devel/dbus-qt4.
** Command failed [exit code 1]: /usr/bin/script -qa /tmp/portupgrade20090806-24177-ogpjj3-0 env UPGRADE_TOOL=portupgrade UPGRADE_PORT=qt4-dbus-4.4.3 UPGRADE_PORT_VER=4.4.3 make
** Fix the problem and try again.
--->  Skipping 'multimedia/qt4-phonon' (qt4-phonon-4.4.3) because a requisite package 'qt4-dbus-4.4.3' (devel/dbus-qt4) failed (specify -k to force)
--->  Skipping 'multimedia/qt4-phonon-gst' (qt4-phonon-gst-4.4.3) because a requisite package 'qt4-dbus-4.4.3' (devel/dbus-qt4) failed (specify -k to force)
--->  Skipping 'misc/qt4-qtconfig' (qt4-qtconfig-4.4.3) because a requisite package 'qt4-dbus-4.4.3' (devel/dbus-qt4) failed (specify -k to force)
--->  Skipping 'devel/qt4-qdbusviewer' (qt4-qdbusviewer-4.4.3) because a requisite package 'qt4-dbus-4.4.3' (devel/dbus-qt4) failed (specify -k to force)
--->  Skipping 'devel/qt4-assistant-adp' (qt4-assistant-adp-4.4.3) because a requisite package 'qt4-dbus-4.4.3' (devel/dbus-qt4) failed (specify -k to force)
** Listing the failed packages (-:ignored / *:skipped / !:failed)
        ! devel/dbus-qt4 (qt4-dbus-4.4.3)       (linker error)
        * multimedia/qt4-phonon (qt4-phonon-4.4.3)
        * multimedia/qt4-phonon-gst (qt4-phonon-gst-4.4.3)
        * misc/qt4-qtconfig (qt4-qtconfig-4.4.3)
        * devel/qt4-qdbusviewer (qt4-qdbusviewer-4.4.3)
        * devel/qt4-assistant-adp (qt4-assistant-adp-4.4.3)


I observed this during an attempt to do a portupgrade -a.  Most of the qt4 libraries upgraded just fine, but now I'm stuck with a qt4 installation that is part 4.5.2 and part 4.4.3.  portversion -l'<' -v shows:

qt4-assistant               <  needs updating (port has 4.5.2) 
qt4-assistant-adp           <  needs updating (port has 4.5.2) 
qt4-dbus                    <  needs updating (port has 4.5.2) 
qt4-designer                <  needs updating (port has 4.5.2) 
qt4-iconengines             <  needs updating (port has 4.5.2_1) 
qt4-linguist                <  needs updating (port has 4.5.2) 
qt4-phonon                  <  needs updating (port has 4.5.2) 
qt4-phonon-gst              <  needs updating (port has 4.5.2) 
qt4-qdbusviewer             <  needs updating (port has 4.5.2) 
qt4-qtconfig                <  needs updating (port has 4.5.2) 
qt4-webkit                  <  needs updating (port has 4.5.2) 

All other qt4 components upgraded properly.

How-To-Repeat: portupgrade -r qt4-dbus on a system that still has qt4 4.4.3 installed.
